title: leonotis decadonta var. decadonta
intro: Leonotis decadonta var. decadonta, also known as Leonotis leonurus, is a perennial herb native to South Africa, characterized by its bright orange or yellow flowers and leaves that have a distinct aroma. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it useful for treating conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Leonotis decadonta var. decadonta include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep, and boost the immune system. Leonotis decadonta var. decadonta can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or capsule, and is also used in traditional medicine to make a medicinal drink called 'lion's tail', which is consumed to treat various health conditions.
